source: Library of Congress, Prints & Photographs Division
license: No known restrictions on publication (public domain — 1906, copyright expired)
title: Home of Chief Ko-Teth Sha-Doc, Ketchikan, Alaska
description: 1906 photograph of the home of Tlingit Chief Ko-Teth Sha-Doc in Ketchikan, showing a traditional carved totem pole and a clan house painted with a large killer-whale design. Photographed March 20, 1906 by Charles Clenton Page, Juneau, Alaska; U.S. Copyright Office H74696.
alt: 1906 black-and-white photograph of the home of Tlingit Chief Ko-Teth Sha-Doc in Ketchikan with totem pole and killer-whale clan-house painting
verifiedBySession: 2026-04-12 — downloaded from loc.gov and visually confirmed
